headline: Is PTC (PTC) Turning Onshape’s Cloud MBD Into Its Core SaaS Differentiator?
summary: On February 26, 2026, PTC Inc. announced a fully cloud-native Model-Based Definition capability embedded in its Onshape CAD and PDM platform, enabling engineering teams to keep manufacturing information tied directly to always-up-to-date 3D models for more efficient, accurate design-to-production workflows. By consolidating product and manufacturing data into a single cloud-native source with browser-based access and downstream-ready formats, PTC is aiming to make its Onshape environment a...

headline: PTC Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC) Meets Key Growth Criteria in "Little Book" Screen
summary: PTC Inc. exemplifies a high-growth stock, meeting strict criteria for accelerating earnings, widening profit margins, and strong analyst upgrades.

headline: Assessing PTC (PTC) Valuation After Its Cloud-Native Onshape Model-Based Definition Upgrade
summary: Why PTC (PTC) is in focus after its latest product move PTC (PTC) has attracted fresh attention after rolling out a fully cloud-native Model-Based Definition capability inside its Onshape CAD and PDM platform, directly tying manufacturing data to 3D product models. This update ties into the company’s broader push around digital product lifecycle software, giving investors a new development to weigh alongside PTC’s recent share performance and profitability metrics. See our latest analysis for...
